From The Director's Desk
"I have been working with Indian engineers here at SCII since September 2013, involved in system development and global human resource development for Japanese companies. I am truly amazed every day at the excellence of Indian engineers and their speed of approaching new things. Combining KSC's vast knowledge-base of over 50 years of system development experience with the skills of young and talented Indian engineers, I want to create a new system development mechanism."
Mr. Junichi Kamiyama
Director,System Consultant Information India (P) Ltd.
SCII Organization Structure

Building Information
Main Building :
SCII building is built in such a way that building is having proper space, good ventilation and
proper sunlight. The ambience around the building is close to nature and help to provide employees with a calm environment to work.
Workplace/workstation :
SCII building ensures congenial working condition. Office employees may concentrate their mind in
work under congenial working condition. A systematic arrangement of SCII office will give naturally
maximum efficiency at a minimum cost on all occasions.
Security office:
Safety and security are first, for that, in SCII we have well established security office. Security
office have record of all visitors on paper. This record should list the visitor’s name, company,
purpose, time in, and time out. Video Surveillance is also available.
Cafeteria:
Cafeteria of SCII is a place where employees can have a short meeting with coffee, can have lunch
together during lunch hours. It’s a neat & clean place with proper lighting and with beautiful
scenery in front.
Guest house:
SCII company guest house is available with all required facilities.
Parking:
SCII is having closed parking for two wheelers & open space parking for four wheelers. The parking is
very spacious and clean area which can accommodate all employees, vendor’s and visitor’s vehicles.

ENTRY & EXIT PROCEDURE
Business Days
|
Non-Business Day
Guidelines:
Two security Guards will be working at all time. During transition time, if there is only one Security guard, he will be responsible for job of both Security Guards.
SCII Employees who have to work on a non-business day have to take permission from PM/Group Leader. The list of employees working on a non-business day (Holiday working list) will be given to Security Guards and Japanese Staff. Generally, only the persons in this list will be allowed to work on a non-business day.
In case of Emergency (when working on a holiday is not pre-scheduled), the staff coming to office have to take the permission from the Person In Charge on that day. If there is no Person In Charge, the Japanese staff who stays in the guest house will act as Person In Charge.
A visitor will be accompanied by the company staff through out his/her stay in the building.
All the information has to be filled in the Visitor Information Register and Visitor Information Slip. Security Guard 1 has to make sure that the information is complete.

GROUP HEALTH INSURANCE POLICY - POLICY SCHEDULE
Attached to and forming part of Group Health Policy No 4101200700000227-00
Additional Conditions : Subject to the following additional Conditions and attached Clauses / Endorsements / Warranties :
* Pre/Post Hospitalisation of 30/60 days respectively.
Cashless and Reimbursement Policy.
Pre-Existing Diseases exclusion waiver waived for all members, First 30 Days Exclusion waiver waived for all members. 1st Year exclusion waiver waived for all members.
Employees shall be covered from DOJ subject to availability of sufficient CD balance being maintained with insurer.
Addition/deletion shall be done on prorata basis once in a month only subject to data being provided to us by 15th of succeeding month.
Mid term increase in SI is not allowed.
No individual can be covered more than once in the policy ? specifically if an employee and spouse are working for the same organization both cannot cover each other and cannot cover the same set of parents. In case at the time of claim it is found that the member is covered more than once, a deletion endorsement (without any refund) of such member will be effected to ensure he/she is covered only once.
The policy excludes treatment with or coverage of Inj- Bevacizumab (e.g Avastin) , Inj. Ranibizumab (e.g Lucentis). Injection Remicade, Oral Chemotherapy, Cyber Knife treatment, Stem cell therapy, Cochlear Implant Procedure, Femtolaser, Robotic surgery, Retrograde intra renal surgery, Lasik treatment for refractive error, Quantum magnetic resonance therapy, Toric Lens covered upto 30,000/- per eye, KT Laser Prostate, Holter monitoring unless otherwise specifically covered as per Policy Schedule.
For all admissible claims where treatment is taken at hospitals/nursing homes which are not in the list of network hospitals empanelled by the Company/Administrator, insured person shall bear 10% of the eligible admissible claim
Administration/ Registration/ Service Charges & Misc. Charges are not payable
* Minimum and Maximum age at entry for Employee is 18 years and 65 years respectively.
Baby cover from Day 1 Covered only after 90 Days of birth
Domiciliary Hospitalization covered upto 20% of SI to a maximum of Rs. 20000
Room Rent Capping covered upto 2% of SI for Non-ICU & 3% of SI for ICU whichever is less. In an event of hospitalization into ICU or Non ICU room at rates exceeding the aforesaid limits, the reimbursement/payment of all other expenses incurred at the Hospital, with the exception of cost of medicines and implants, shall be made in the same proportion as the admissible room rate per day bears to the actual room rate per day (including but not limited to boarding and nursing  expenses).
Coverage applicable is as per the benefit chart, annexure A attached along with.
All other terms and conditions as per Group Health Insurance Policy wordings as attached.
Important Note :
Please examine this Policy including its attachment Schedule/ Annexture if any. In the event of any discrepancy, contact the office of the Company immediately, it being noted that this policy shall be otherwise considered as being entirely in order.
In case of payment by cheque, in the event dishonor of cheque for any reason whatsover, insurance provided under this document automatically stands cancelled from the inception irrespective of whether a seperate communication is sent or not. Any claim arrising or related to consequences of the pre-existing disease is excluded from the scope of policy cover unless the same is covered on payment of premium and coverage terms mentioned in the schedule.
This is a Contract between the Company and the Insured Person(s). The Insured Person(s) shall not transfer, assign, alienate or in any way pass the benefits and /or liabilities to any other person, institution, hospital, company or body corporate without specific approval in writing by a duly authorised officer of the company. However, if the Insured Person(s) is permanently incapacitated or deceased, the legal heirs of the insured may represent him in respect of claim under the policy.

text:
General Guidelines
Before coming to work each day, check if you are experiencing flu like symptoms
If Yes, Do not come to work, Inform your GL/Manager about the same.
How to Protect Yourself & Others(Prevention)
Wear face coverings at all times in office
Maintain social distancing
Wash your hands often with soap and water for at least 20 seconds. Use an alcohol-based hand sanitizer that contains at least 60% alcohol if soap and water are not available.
Avoid touching your eyes, nose, and mouth with unwashed hands.
Avoid close contact with people who are sick.
Cover your cough or sneeze with a tissue, then throw the tissue in the trash.
Clean and disinfect frequently touched objects and surfaces.
Maintain at least 1 meter (3 feet) distance between yourself and other people, particularly those who are coughing, sneezing and have a fever.
Stay home if you feel unwell.
Reporting Protocol
Health Status
Step 1
Step 2
Step 3
Step 4
Step 5
GL/Manager
Reporting each step to BackOffice
Employee is Covid Positive
Immediately Inform your GL, Do not come to work.
Send the positive report copy to GL.
Follow doctors advice on road to recovery
After recovery, get tested again.
If Positive , go back to step 2, If negative proceed to step 4
Send the negative report to GL and await further instructions.
Send mail
To : backoffice@scii.in
CC : gl@scii.in, managers@scii.in
Family/ Flat mates/ room mates are covid postive(Applicable for all members in the Home/Room/Flat)
Immediately Inform your GL, Do not come to work.
Get tested for covid 19
If Positive Send report to GL Follow doctors advice on road to recovery, go to step 5
If Negative, Inform & send report to GL and await further instructions
After recovery, get tested again.
If Positive , go back to step 3, If negative go to step 4
Send mail
To : backoffice@scii.in
CC : gl@scii.in, managers@scii.in
Contact With Someone Who’s Infected With COVID-19
Immediately Inform your GL
Do not come to work until further instructions
Self-quarantine
Monitor yourself for known symptoms of Covid-19
If you observe onset of the symptoms in you or just want to confirm if you are infected, get yourself tested
If Positive Send report to GL Follow doctors advice on road to recovery, go to step 5
If Negative, Inform & send report to GL and await further instructions
After recovery, get tested again.
If Positive , go back to step 3, If negative go to step 4
Send mail
To : backoffice@scii.in
CC : gl@scii.in, managers@scii.in
Neighbours [separate compound/building] are covid positive
Immediately Inform your GL, Check if you are Experiencing  flu like symptoms
At work avoid contact as much as possible , strictly wear mask at all times, avoid meetings and contact with colleagues
Neighbours [same compound/building] are covid positive
Immediately Inform your GL, Check if you are Experiencing  flu like symptoms
Do not come to work until further instructions
Send mail
To : backoffice@scii.in
CC : gl@scii.in, managers@scii.in
Experiencing Mild flu like symptoms
Do not come to work, Inform GL.
Only after you feel perfectly healthy you should attend office
Send mail
To : backoffice@scii.in
CC : gl@scii.in, managers@scii.in
Flu like symptoms
Headache, Bodyache, fatigue, cough, cold, difficulty in breathing, Diarrhea  and etc
Note: If you are unable to contact your GL/Manager DO NOT COME TO OFFICE Until discussion with GL/Manager
Your department GL / Manager should be mandatorily informed on anything related to health and covid , do not take independent decisions or contat others for intimation

Library Rules & Regulations
1.	When the Employee needs to borrow the books, ask the Library Management member to open the lock of the book shelf which is located in GF Open Space East
.
2.	After taking book from the shelf, the Employee needs to sign the registration book, which is kept by the Library Management member, by agreeing with the rules of lending books.
3.	If the Employee fails to find the book which the Employee needs in the book shelf, then the Employee can find the person who has borrowed the book from the registration book.
4.	The Employee should not sublet the books to other person.
The registration book has to be maintained properly.
5.	The Employee can take the books home, but have to bring the books to the office every working day.
6.	A Book will be issued for 30 days only. However, issued books may be recalled earlier, if urgently required by the Library. If member wants to keep it for more than 30 days, he/she needs to renew it.
7.	A Book must be returned in the same condition in which it was issued.
8.	In case of marking/underlining / folding of pages of books, the cost of the latest edition of the book will be charged from the borrower.
9.	The Library Management member should check the book shelf once every month to take the inventory of all books.
Rules of lending Library
I agree with the following rules and borrow the books.
•	I will handle the books carefully.
•	I will compensate the books in case of losing the books or damaging the books.
•	I will not sublet the books the third person.
•	Even if I take the books home, I will bring the books to the office every working day.
